name: Warp Background Demo
source_code:
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/card"
import { WarpBackground } from "@/registry/magicui/warp-background"

export default function ExampleComponentDemo() {
  return (
    <WarpBackground>
      <Card className="w-80">
        <CardContent className="flex flex-col gap-2 p-4">
          <CardTitle>Congratulations on Your Promotion!</CardTitle>
          <CardDescription>
            Your hard work and dedication have paid off. We're thrilled to
            see you take this next step in your career. Keep up the fantastic
            work!
          </CardDescription>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </WarpBackground>
  )
}
description: Example showing a card with a time warping background effect.

export default function ExampleComponentDemo() {

visual_summary: A background with a warped effect. Use when you want to add a unique, eye-catching background to your page, often to make a focal point or draw attention to an element.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Warp Background Demo
Description: A background with a warped effect. Use when you want to add a unique, eye-catching background to your page, often to make a focal point or draw attention to an element.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: 
Tags: background, warped, effect

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
